center.title: Version 3.1.0
features: - Elements allow subsections
- True mathematical functions
- A roadmap for project overview
- New quick-guides as addition to tutorials
- Bug fixes and improvements
center.link-text: Click the block to read the full changelog!

north-east.title: Documentation Updates
features: - A roadmap showing progress and future plans for the project
- A ton of new quick-guides have been added to quickly learn specific skills
north-east.link-text: Click the block to go to the tutorials section!

east.title: True Functions
features: - You can now define math functions in the functions section
- New function condition added that uses math functions
east.link-text: Click the block to read the full function documentation!

south-east.title: Element Subsections
features: - Elements can now be nested inside of subsections
- Subsections can be nested inside of other subsections
- Use them to organize your quests and actions into logical groups
south-east.link-text: Click the block to read more about subsections!

center.title: Version 3.0.0
features: - Better placeholder support
- Support for other NPC providers and a unified item system
- Support for MiniMessage and MineDown
- Improved versioning and terminology rework
- Comprehensive restructuring and configuration cleanup
- Now using Paper and PacketEvents instead of Spigot and ProtocolLib
center.link-text: Click the block to read the full changelog!

north-west.title: Changed Fundamentals
features: - Spigot is no longer supported, Paper is now required
- ProtocolLib replaced with PacketEvents

west.title: Element improvements
features: - Placeholder support for actions, objectives, and more!
- Unified item system with typed definitions similar to actions and objectives
- Better text parsing support for MiniMessage and MineDown

south-west.title: Restructuring
features: - Comprehensive restructuring and cleanup of all configuration files
- Terminology rework by renaming “events” to “actions” and “variables” to “placeholders”
- Versioning system for BetonQuest modules and quest packages

north-east.title: New API
features: - Brand new API for BetonQuest allows for better integration with other plugins
- Documented and will receive less breaking changes in the future
- Separately versioned to provide better compatibility to developers
north-east.link-text: Click the block to read the full API documentation!
